title: Molotov: Tiruppon Kavacham
description: Ghanesha Sivaperuman and Devasenapathy Murugan are two orphan brothers living in the fictional Malainaadu, under Guru Dronar Acharyar. One day, Pradeep Chen Long IPS recruits Ghanesha for a violent mission which changes destiny.
cast:
S.Rishikesh AS Ghanesha 'Molotov' Sivanperuman
Sudharshan Naidu AS Devasenapathy Murugan IPS
Rae Nichols Adam Shim AS Pradeep Chen Long, Pranav Chan Long
Akhil Syed AS Guru Dronar Acharyar
Vighnesh Gunasekaran AS Naradhan Sivanperuman
Jaysrie AS Buddhipriya Murugan
Lohidakshya Rishesringar	AS Matthews Nanmugan
Jai Ganesh Dilli Babu	AS Manibadran Yaksha Shetty
Akash Kannan AS Pugazhendhi Yaksha Menon
P.T. Sharvin AS Nambi
Rakeshh Krishnan AS Yakshoga Kubhera Kumar Y2K
Alben Stevenson AS George Grizzly Bear Vetri
licensing_terms: The Licensing Cut for this project, as per discussions with my team, should be a 60 to 40 cut and any additional profits will be equally shared between both Immortelle Film Congregation Studio as well as the distribution.

producer: SL MEDIA X AISWARYA MOVIE MAKERS

title: MALAYALAKKARA RESIDENCY
description: Malayalakkara Residency is a high-energy Malayalam comedy-drama that brings together an unprecedented ensemble of India’s finest comic legends and National Award winners. Set within the eccentric walls of a local residency, the film weaves a chaotic and hilarious web of misunderstandings and social satire.
cast: Suraj Venjarammoodu, Salim Kumar, Innocent, Jagathy Sreekumar, Indrans, Mammukoya, Kalpana, Bheeman Reghu.
distribution_territories:
1. Distribution Territories
Primary Territory: India (Satellite & Digital).

Global Territories: Worldwide (Excluding Physical/Audio limitations).

Priority Markets: UAE/GCC, USA, UK, Canada, and Spain (Targeting the Spanish AVOD pilot).

title: Vishudha Yudha
description: "A definitive spiritual biography of St. Jude Thaddeus, one of the twelve apostles of Jesus. Vishudha Yudha focuses on the 'Apostle of Hope' and his missionary travels through Judea, Mesopotamia, and Persia. The film highlights his role as a kinsman of Jesus and the profound impact of his Epistle on the early Christian community. Produced by Bible Tele Cinema, this production serves as both a historical record and a source of spiritual inspiration for the global Christian community."

title: Aborginals
description: Echoes of those silenced throughout time wash over as a wave of justice and liberty. This documentary stands as a bard to those tales of struggles to gain freedom of expression that has been held back from the scheduled caste community and their unrelenting fight for equality and the eventual earning of what time had owed them.

title: The Karma House
description:
The Karma House" is a high-stakes, next-generation reality series designed for the OTT landscape. Unlike traditional formats, this show introduces a unique Social Credit System.
12 influencers and commoners are locked in a high-tech house where their survival depends not just on audience votes, but on their 'Karma Score'. Every action—whether helping a housemate or playing a mind game—adds or deducts digital credits. These credits are the only currency to buy food, luxury, or immunity. It’s a psychological experiment that reveals the true face behind the social media filters. Who will trade their morals for survival?
cast:
​Top Social Media Influencers (5M+ reach)
​Controversial Reality Stars
​Youth Icons & Fitness Experts
​Rising Digital Content Creators
licensing_terms: Exclusive Digital Streaming and VOD (Video on Demand) rights for a period of 5 years. This includes worldwide distribution rights with a primary focus on the Indian market. The producer retains the rights for merchandising and future IP spin-offs beyond the 5-year term."
